Bus Timings

Comprehensive Guide to Al Qusais Bus Station in Dubai

November 16, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Al Qusais Bus Station is a key transit hub in Dubai, located in the bustling Muhaisnah 2 area. Serving as a major connection point for travelers across the city, it offers easy access to various bus routes that link to important destinations. Whether you’re commuting for work, shopping, or leisure, Al Qusais Bus Station provides a reliable and convenient option for daily travelers.

Address

Muhaisnah 2 Dubai United Arab Emirates

Call Center Number: 8009090

Email: ask@rta. ae

View Google Directions Here.

Bus Routes and Timings

Al Qusais Bus Station serves several important routes, making it a vital link in Dubai’s transportation network. Below is a list of the bus routes and their respective bay numbers:

Bus Route Bay Destination
33 1 Al Ghubaiba
32C 2 Al Satwa
63E 3 Al Quoz
13B 4 Gold Souq
34 5 Al Khawaneej 2
34 5 Etisalat
97 6 Jabal Ali Ind
13A 7 Gold Souq
13D 8 Gold Souq

Bus Route Details

Al Qusais Bus Station serves as a crucial hub in Dubai’s transportation network, providing access to various key destinations. Below are the primary bus routes available at the station:

  • Bus Route 33: Bay 1 Connecting passengers to Al Ghubaiba.

  • Bus Route 32C: Bay 2 Linking Al Qusais Bus Station with Al Satwa.
  • Bus Route 63E: Bay 3 Providing service between Al Qusais and Al Quoz.
  • Bus Route 13B: Bay 4 Traveling to the Gold Souq.
  • Bus Route 34: Bay 5 Connecting to Al Khawaneej 2 and Etisalat.
  • Bus Route 97: Bay 6 Providing transportation to Jabal Ali Industrial Area.
  • Bus Route 13A and 13D: Bay 7 and 8 Both heading to Gold Souq.

For real-time bus arrival updates, passengers can SMS ‘D’ followed by the bus stop ID to 5223.

Facilities

  • Parking

  • Mosque
  • Pedestrian Zone
  • Nol Card Top-up
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Nearby Destinations

The strategic location of Al Qusais Bus Station offers convenient access to a variety of local amenities, making it a valuable transit point for commuters and visitors in the area. The station is close to restaurants, major buildings, and key streets, facilitating easy travel within Dubai.

Restaurants

  • Al Salama Restaurant: A popular spot offering local and international dishes.

  • Aziz Afghan Restaurant: Known for its authentic Afghan cuisine.
  • Azlan Darabar Restaurant: Offers a mix of flavorful Middle Eastern and South Asian food.

Landmarks

  • Dulsco Labour Accommodation: A prominent residential complex in the area.

  • Shaklan Hypermarket: A local supermarket offering a wide range of products.
  • Transguard Group Accommodation: A key housing facility near the station.

Streets

  • Algeria Street: A major road providing easy access to the surrounding area.

Nearby Stops

  1. Al Qusais, Bus Station 6(24m): 97

  2. Muhaisnah 2, Bus Station External 2(32m): 13

  3. Muhaisnah 2, Bus Station External 1(39m): 13

  4. Algeria Street 3-1(154m): 34, 63E

  5. Algeria Street 3-2(171m): 63E, 97

Al Qusais Bus Station is more than just a transit hub; it’s a key point for accessing many of Dubai’s essential services and destinations. With its wide range of facilities, frequent bus routes, and nearby amenities, this station is an essential part of the city’s public transportation network. Whether you’re commuting locally or traveling across the city, Al Qusais Bus Station provides a convenient and efficient transportation option.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 16, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
